summary: Backend smoke after removing emergentintegrations and jq from requirements.txt. Backend boots cleanly with no ImportError. All 7 requested critical endpoints respond 200 with expected payloads. requirements.txt is clean of the offending lines and no .py file imports emergentintegrations.
passed: Backend supervisor process up; latest reload shows 'Application startup complete' with no ImportError
POST /api/auth/login (admin@brandkrt.com) -> 200, returns user(role=admin) + access_token, sets cookies
GET /api/admin/overview -> 200, returns cards + weekly charts arrays
POST /api/auth/register new influencer -> 200, user created, cookies set
action_items: Safe to proceed with Render deploy; dependency cleanup did not break any backend functionality.

Note (informational only, not a blocker): backend.err.log contains an older traceback 'ImportError: attempted relative import with no known parent package' from a previous reload of server.py line 489 `from . import domain`. Current process is healthy and serving 200s, but main agent may want to verify that fallback path is reachable only when run as a package.
